form.formComment: Returns from a 33-day let-up. Most recently ran last of 8 at this track on March 6 over 1400m, 15 len behind Dernier Helianthe carrying 54kg at $84.70. The start before that 8th of 10 at this track on February 5 over 900m, 10 len behind Nanami with 54kg at $215.80. Draws the inside but looks tested.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when scored a big 4 len win at this track December 19 over 900m defeating King Sukeyo carrying 55kg at $16.30. Expect a bold showing.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Last start sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 11 at this track on March 6 over 900m, 3 len behind Kleis Avanti carrying 54kg at $7.70. Before that held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at this track on January 4 over 900m, 2.5 len behind Earth Jewel with 54kg at $13.30. Going well enough to take this out.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six months break. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Monbetsu October 16 over 1000m, 10 len behind A Shin Mirami carrying 55kg at $8.20. On debut third of 8 at Monbetsu July 9 over 1000m, 4 len behind M T Rio with 55kg at $8. Has the ability to run well.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming didn't do much in the run home; 7th of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 13 len behind Black Tourmaline with 53kg at $17.20. Last start rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 11 at Urawa on March 19 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Sayono Big Alma with 56kg at $4.40. Well placed and sure to prove tough to beat.
